//postCreate: Runs once on codespace creation. `npm ci` pulls workspace deps + puppeteer's Chromium (~280 MB); `npm test` verifies the 194-test regression gate before the user opens a single file. Both fast enough to keep total <60s on Codespaces 4-core.
//env: Nudge puppeteer to be terser in CI-ish environments. The renderer already checks CI/DOCKER_CONTAINER/GITHUB_ACTIONS.
